title: The Sequence Window
description:
The Sequence Window

The Sequence Window

The sequence window can be displayed at the right side of the window by clicking the vision sequence in the flowchart or selecting the sequence in the sequence tree.

The sequence window is used to:

	Set properties for the vision sequence
	Examine the results for the entire vision
	 sequence
